TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07

#7 SING/YEE CC FOR TRIAL W/O JURY. ALL PRESENT. OP STMT BY PTF/DEF. STIP FOR JUD AS TO DEFT PACINI & PACINI INC. DBA GOLDEN KEY CONSTRUCTION FOR $25,000 WHICH INCLUDES PRINCIPAL INT, AF & COST. TRIAL WILL PROCEDE ON CAUSE OF ACTION RE DISREGARD OF CORPORATE VEIL OR ENTITY AND FRAUD & DECEIT. OP STMT BY PLT AND DEFT. ORAL & WRITTEN TESTIMONY BY PLT TAKEN/RECEIVED. NO DEFENSE OFFERED. ARGUMENTS. SUBMITTED.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NEWTON, RICHARD DALE
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT PACINI & PACINI, INC., DBA GOLDEN KEY BUILDERS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACINI & PACINI, INC., DBA GOLDEN KEY BUILDERS $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,000.00, STIP JUD IS AGAINST PACINI & PACINI INC. A CALIF CORP DBA GOLDEN KEY BUILDERS. AMOUNT INCLUDES PRINCIPAL, INTEREST, ATTY FEE & COST. ON SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD/DECEIT), PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANTS SUSAN LYNN PACINI, CAROL ANN PACINI & ANTHONY VITO PACINI.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF NEWTON, RICHARD DALE
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR, COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND PAY SANCTIONS.
